source.note: Gu Yuan historical portrait archive images supplied for the public family archive section.

intro.bodyEn: A focused portrait archive tracing Gu Yuan across different periods of family memory, studio life, and exhibition history.
intro.bodyCn: 一組聚焦古元不同時期形象、家庭記憶、創作生活與展覽歷史的肖像檔案。

records.captionEn: Historical archival portrait of Gu Yuan
Gu Yuan in his later years
Gu Yuan during the early revolutionary period
Gu Yuan working in his studio
Exhibition view featuring Gu Yuan archival imagery
records.captionCn: 古元相關展覽現場影像

records.captionEn: Young Gu Yuan and his wife during early years.
records.captionCn: 青年時期的古元與夫人。

records.captionEn: Young Gu Yuan and his wife during the revolutionary period.
records.captionCn: 革命時期的青年古元與夫人。

records.captionEn: Gu Yuan working on woodcut compositions and archival materials.
records.captionCn: 古元整理作品與創作時期影像。

records.captionEn: Gu Yuan with artists, students, and colleagues.
records.captionCn: 古元與藝術家、學生及同事合影。

records.captionEn: Gu Yuan during a field research and sketching period.
records.captionCn: 古元寫生與考察時期影像。
